hooks.command: node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c); process.stdin.on('end',()=>{ const j=JSON.parse(d||'{}'); const fp=(j.tool_input&&j.tool_input.file_path)||''; if(fp.includes('public/index.html')){ const {execSync}=require('child_process'); try{ execSync('node scripts/verify-final.cjs',{stdio:'inherit',cwd:'c:/Users/Kaustav Bagchi/OneDrive/Desktop/Watcher'}); }catch(e){ process.exit(1); } } });"
